name: Trout and Vegetables in Foil
recipeInstructions:
This delicious dish can be prepared for a noon campfire if the camp itself has a blender or food processor in its kitchen, or prepare before the trip at home. If the fish is to be a sizable one, ensure you have enough foil in one piece; if the servings are to be individual for each guest, then cut the foil accordingly.
1. Clean the trout and sprinkle lemon juice, salt, pepper, and herbs inside and out.
2. Put vegetables through the food processor, mix well, and strain.
3. Saute vegetables in butter until they are soft. Stuff each fish with the sautéed vegetables before wrapping loosely in foil.
4. Place in ashes or on a cookie sheet in an oven preheated to 450°F for 15-20 minutes.
5. Serve.
